capabilities.name: bash-language-profile
capabilities.trigger: Bash-specific judgment is material to quoting, expansion, arrays, pipelines, traps, subprocesses, files, portability, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: bats-test-profile
capabilities.trigger: Bats-specific test judgment is material to evaluation, run status and output, hooks, fixtures, TAP, file descriptors, parallelism, background cleanup, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: composing-approved-roadmap-assignments
capabilities.trigger: A human-approved roadmap phase or explicitly approved bounded phase sequence needs a reviewable top-level coding-agent manager assignment with authority, scope, evidence, acceptance, stop, reporting, and handoff boundaries.

capabilities.name: composing-bounded-worker-assignments
capabilities.trigger: Delegation is already authorized and selected, and one non-trivial worker assignment needs explicit boundaries.

capabilities.name: debugging-systematically
capabilities.trigger: Behavior is failing, inconsistent, flaky, unexplained, or has multiple plausible causes.

capabilities.name: designing-significant-changes
capabilities.trigger: Consequential behavior, architecture, ownership, contracts, safety, or irreversible choices remain unresolved.

capabilities.name: go-language-profile
capabilities.trigger: Go-specific judgment is material to structure, errors, context, interfaces, generics, concurrency, public APIs, reflection, unsafe, cgo, subprocesses, compatibility, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: implementing-with-test-discipline
capabilities.trigger: An authorized behavior change benefits from executable behavioral evidence proportional to risk.

capabilities.name: nix-language-profile
capabilities.trigger: Nix-specific judgment is material to expressions, attribute sets, modules, derivations, flakes, overlays, purity, evaluation, store exposure, activation, remote builders, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: planning-repository-work
capabilities.trigger: An accepted objective needs dependent steps, cross-file coordination, staged risk reduction, or durable handoff.

capabilities.name: postgresql-database-profile
capabilities.trigger: PostgreSQL-specific judgment is material to SQL, schemas, MVCC, transactions, locks, DDL, migrations, routines, triggers, security, backup and restore, replication, maintenance, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: python-language-profile
capabilities.trigger: Python-specific judgment is material to structure, complexity, public APIs, typing, concurrency, serialization, packaging, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: reviewing-and-verifying-repository-work
capabilities.trigger: A bounded artifact or resulting repository state needs evidence-backed acceptance, correction, disposition, or a completion claim.

capabilities.name: ruby-language-profile
capabilities.trigger: Ruby-specific judgment is material to structure, exceptions, blocks, shared state, dynamic dispatch, metaprogramming, callbacks, concurrency, gems, public compatibility, serialization, subprocesses, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: sqlite-database-profile
capabilities.trigger: SQLite-specific judgment is material to SQL, transaction modes, single-writer concurrency, busy handling, journal or WAL behavior, schema rebuilds, pragmas, affinity, file ownership, backup and integrity, extensions, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: synthesizing-repository-guidance
capabilities.trigger: A dense, duplicated, mixed-scope, private, or source-derived guidance corpus needs ownership and migration dispositions before rewrite.

capabilities.name: zsh-language-profile
capabilities.trigger: Zsh-specific judgment is material to option state, arrays, expansion, globbing, autoloading, startup or interactive behavior, hooks, modules, processes, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.

capabilities.name: zunit-test-profile
capabilities.trigger: An exact APG-verified ZUnit v0.8.2 and Zsh 5.9.2 pair needs ZUnit-specific judgment about runner invocation, discovery, assertions, hooks, configuration, output, isolation, process cleanup, compatibility, or warning and crisis thresholds beyond repository policy.
